body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: Postgres bus transport
body.intention: I intend that we verify the Postgres bus transport has no silent regressions 14 days after shipping.
body.description:
**What changed:** IMAP bus transport (_StubServer/_DovecotClient) replaced with Postgres LISTEN/NOTIFY + bus.messages table.

**Predicted unintended effects:**
1. `bus.messages` accumulates rows without pruning — old seen=true messages pile up indefinitely; no retention policy yet
2. LISTEN/NOTIFY uses a persistent connection; if Postgres restarts, the LISTEN subscription is lost silently — reconnect logic may not exist yet
3. Any code that directly imports from `bus/imap_server.py` (outside of bus/ itself) breaks on the next import
4. Test fixtures that mock IMAPServer need updating; tests that don't mock at all now hit real Postgres
5. `web UI` message-feed reads that pointed at IMAP mailboxes now need to point at bus.messages — silent empty feed if not updated

**Signals to watch:**
- `SELECT count(*) FROM bus.messages WHERE seen=true AND created_at < now() - interval '7 days'` growing without bound
- `grep -r 'imap_server' devices/ --include='*.py'` returns hits outside bus/ (stale imports)
- DickSimnel logs showing 'LISTEN subscription lost' or reconnect errors after Postgres restart
- Web UI feed showing empty / stale after the transport swap

**Gate condition:** Check by 2026-06-24 or when T-bus-postgres-transport closes, whichever is later.

**Affected files:** None — observation and verification only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe predicted effects; annotate outcome as occurred / clear / partial and close
**Completion criteria:** All five predicted effects checked; each annotated as occurred/clear/partial; any 'occurred' effects either fixed inline or have a follow-up ticket
**Test plan:** no tests — this is an observation ticket
